name: cyclizar
flavor_texts: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.
text: Cyclizar is the Mount Pokémon. It is a dragon and normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: shed-skin, regenerator (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 95, Defense: 65, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 121. Evolution line: cyclizar. Lore: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals. It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.
